text:
is an artbook published by GAINAX on 18 January 2002 and republished digitally by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 07 July 2020. It features the original drawings of the film The End of Evangelion.

Overview

The 2020 version includes 28 color pages that were not present in the original release. https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gZ0000808/
